idea-plugin.name: One Thing Dark Theme
idea-plugin.vendor: Based on One Thing theme by Nyoman Sunima
idea-plugin.description:
A minimalist dark theme for IntelliJ-based IDEs, ported from the One Thing theme by Nyoman Sunima.

Features:
  • Clean, distraction-free minimal design
  • Mostly grayscale syntax highlighting with subtle differentiation
  • Very dark background (#02010A) for reduced eye strain
  • Support for all major languages and frameworks
  • Consistent UI theming across all IDE components
  • VCS integration with subtle color indicators

Based on the excellent One Thing theme by Nyoman Sunima.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Full UI theme with minimal dark design
  • Grayscale syntax highlighting with subtle color accents
  • Git/VCS integration with color-coded diff indicators
  • Error, warning, and info highlighting
  • Support for Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Rust, Go, and more
